todos.content: Standardize WebSocket typing across ws-handler, ws-gateway, ws-bridge; fix duplicate 'client', raw/undefined/null mismatches
Fix Fastify route definitions in admin/auth/email routes: schema shape, handlers, cookie plugin typing
Fix openpgp import in smtp-service.ts and nodemailer Attachment type issues
Clean up IMAP adapter types; ensure module paths correct
Fix flag-sync/mailbox-sync service issues: ws-gateway path, allowed actions, FlagState fields
Rewrite mailparser usage in mime-parser.ts to match current API; fix ParsedMail/attachment types
Standardize WebSocket typing across ws-handler, ws-gateway, ws-bridge; fix duplicate 'client', raw/undefined/null mismatches
Fix Fastify route definitions in admin.routes.ts/auth.routes.ts/email.routes.ts: incorrect schema shape (description/summary), handler signatures, and cookie plugin typing
Fix mail.routes.ts / email.routes.ts small issues: delete non-optional, ids/limit params.
Clean up services/utils type mismatches (null vs undefined; api-response/shared/types)
Fix openpgp import in smtp-service.ts and nodemailer Attachment type issues (TS2305/TS2694).
Clean up IMAP adapter types: accountId on never, object.value/data typing; ensure module paths for errors/handler, utils/crypto, etc.
Fix flag-sync and mailbox-sync service issues: ws-gateway path, allowed actions set/remove/add, FlagState missing uid/mailbox fields (TS2307/TS2345).
Rewrite mailparser usage in mime-parser.ts to match current API; fix types for ParsedMail and attachment loops.
Fix html-sanitizer.ts implicit 'any' parameters and mismatched config type assignment (TS7006/TS2322).
Normalize mime-pipeline.ts risk/result types: align strings vs structured objects for security-risk fields.
Standardize WebSocket typing across ws-handler, ws-gateway, ws-bridge; fix duplicate 'client', raw/undefined/null mismatches.
Fix Fastify route definitions in admin.routes.ts/auth.routes.ts/email.routes.ts: incorrect schema shape (description/summary), handler signatures, and cookie plugin typing.
Fix mail.routes.ts / email.routes.ts small issues: delete on non-optional property, ids/limit param missing fields (TS2769/TS2790).
Clean up services and utils type mismatches: null vs undefined in admin-service/attachment-service; fix api-response/shared/types imports; Redis/Sequelize/OTEL config shapes.
